name: pembukuan-telegram-bot
postCreateCommand: /usr/bin/python -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/python -m pip install --upgrade pip && .venv/bin/python -m pip install -e '.[dev]' && mkdir -p data exports backups && .venv/bin/python -m alembic upgrade head

TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN.description: A new Telegram bot token from @BotFather. Never commit it to the repository.

ALLOWED_USER_IDS.description: Comma-separated Telegram user IDs allowed to access the bot.

ADMIN_USER_ID.description: Telegram user ID for bot administration.
